stories.original_summary: A newly identified ichthyosaur from the UK’s Jurassic Coast is rewriting part of the prehistoric playbook. Nicknamed the “Sword Dragon of Dorset,” the three-meter-long marine reptile lived during a poorly understood window of evolution when major ichthyosaur groups were disappearing and new ones eme
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Sword Dragon Bones Rewrite Sea Beast Lore!
stories.fantasy_story: Along the shores of the Dragon Coast, a grand discovery has been unearthed. The bones of a three-meter-long 'Sword Dragon' have revealed secrets of old sea beasts. This ancient creature's finding is changing what our Elder Wizards knew about the deep ocean's past.

stories.original_headline: Can solar storms trigger earthquakes? Scientists propose surprising link
stories.original_summary: Scientists have proposed a surprising connection between solar flares and earthquakes. When solar activity disturbs the ionosphere, it may generate electric fields that penetrate fragile fracture zones in Earth’s crust. If a fault is already critically stressed, this extra electrostatic pressure cou
stories.fantasy_headline: Sun's Fury May Stir Earth's Tremors, Wizards Propose!
stories.fantasy_story: Our wisest Alchemists and Sky-Gazers propose a startling connection between the sun's fiery temper and the ground's shudders. They believe that great bursts of celestial magic from the sun can disturb the sky's aether. These mystic energies might then seep into the kingdom's very foundations, stirring slumbering cracks and causing the earth to tremble.

stories.original_headline: Apple’s new age verification tools block underage app downloads where required by law
stories.original_summary: Apple, like many others, has had to launch age verification features in response to new requirements for age checks in many regions, and on Tuesday, the company announced new details about its tools that developers can use to "meet their age assurance obligations under upcoming U.S. and regional law
stories.fantasy_headline: Applewood Clan Casts Guardian Spells on Young Enchantment Seekers!
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Applewood Clan of Enchantments has revealed new guardian spells. These magical wards will ensure that only those of proper age can acquire certain powerful artifacts or scrolls, as dictated by royal decrees. Scribes and Artificers can now use these tools to meet their duties across various kingdoms.
